title: tetranthera multiflora
intro: Tetranthera multiflora, also known as the Chinese tetranthera, is a flowering plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain a compound called tetranolide, a potential anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Tetranthera multiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Tetranthera multiflora is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in various traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
